categories.name: Operating Systems
categories.description: Repositories focused on kernel development, system drivers, or core OS components (e.g., Linux, Windows).

categories.name: Web Frameworks & Libraries
categories.description: Repositories providing front-end or back-end frameworks, UI components, or web application libraries (e.g., React, Vue, Bootstrap).

categories.name: Programming Languages & Interpreters
categories.description: Repositories containing the source code, compilers, or runtime environments for specific programming languages (e.g., Python, C++, Rust).

categories.name: Development Tools & IDEs
categories.description: Repositories focused on software development utilities, integrated development environments, or build systems (e.g., VS Code, Vite, Docker).

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Repositories that do not fit into the above specific technical domains.
